justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified and handled the adversarial input as not a date and time, then accurately processed all subsequent temporal requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative slots when the user's preferred times were unavailable, offering relevant options and avoiding previously rejected dates.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and booked the appointment without any unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone throughout the conversation.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent gracefully recovered from initial unavailability by offering new, relevant options and maintaining full context of the user's preferences.
